stemHtml: What is correct regarding in-flight visibility when there is shallow fog at the aerodrome with NO cloud above?

options.a: At about 100 ft the downward slant visibility from above the fog layer may be much less than the horizontal visibility at ground level.
options.b: When overhead the aerodrome and well above the fog, objects on the aerodrome can often be seen relatively clearly.
options.c: As the pilot descends to the level of the fog, the aerodrome runway becomes more visible.
options.d: The visibility given at ground level will be greater than the in-flight visibility.
